recommendations.title: Nameless Gangster
recommendations.overview: A corrupt customs official joins forces with a vicious gangster to form the most powerful crime partnership in Busan.

recommendations.title: Kundo: Age of the Rampant
recommendations.overview: In 1862, amidst the rule of the late Joseon dynasty in Korea, a band of fighters named Kundo rise against the unjust authorities.

recommendations.title: A Violent Prosecutor
recommendations.overview: After a prosecution lawyer is framed and convicted for murder, he tries to catch the real murderer from jail with the help of a con artist.

recommendations.title: The Spy Gone North
recommendations.overview: South Korea, 1993. An agent of the National Intelligence Service is sent to Beijing to infiltrate a group of North Korean officials with the ultimate goal of obtaining information about their nuclear program.

recommendations.title: Here After
recommendations.overview: When her teen daughter displays increasingly disturbing behavior after a near death experience, a mother becomes convinced the girl brought something evil back from the other side.

recommendations.title: Broker
recommendations.overview: Sang-hyun is always struggling from debt, and Dong-soo works at a baby box facility. On a rainy night, they steal the baby Woo-sung, who was left in the baby box, to sell him at a good price. Meanwhile, detectives were watching, and they quietly trac

recommendations.title: I'm Off Then
recommendations.overview: Based on the book "Ich bin dann mal weg" by Hape Kerkeling where the author describes his journey on the Way of St. James, a pilgrimage route, and the people he encounters there.

recommendations.title: Illang: The Wolf Brigade
recommendations.overview: In 2029, an elite police squad combats an anti-reunification terrorist group while another enemy lurks nearby.

recommendations.title: House at the End of the Street
recommendations.overview: A mother and daughter move to a new town and find themselves living next door to a house where a young girl murdered her parents. When the daughter befriends the surviving son, she learns the story is far from over.

recommendations.title: Whispering Corridors
recommendations.overview: The ghost of a student who died at a Korean school comes back to seek vengeance and protect her friends.
